memberdef.name: xmlEntityLt
memberdef.initializer: = { NULL, XML_ENTITY_DECL, (xmlChar *) "lt", NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, (xmlChar *) "<", (xmlChar *) "<", 1, XML_INTERNAL_PREDEFINED_ENTITY, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 0, 0, 0 }

memberdef.name: xmlEntityGt
memberdef.initializer: = { NULL, XML_ENTITY_DECL, (xmlChar *) "gt", NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, (xmlChar *) ">", (xmlChar *) ">", 1, XML_INTERNAL_PREDEFINED_ENTITY, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 0, 0, 0 }

memberdef.name: xmlEntityAmp
memberdef.initializer: = { NULL, XML_ENTITY_DECL, (xmlChar *) "amp", NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, (xmlChar *) "&", (xmlChar *) "&", 1, XML_INTERNAL_PREDEFINED_ENTITY, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 0, 0, 0 }

memberdef.name: xmlEntityQuot
memberdef.initializer: = { NULL, XML_ENTITY_DECL, (xmlChar *) "quot", NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, (xmlChar *) "\"", (xmlChar *) "\"", 1, XML_INTERNAL_PREDEFINED_ENTITY, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 0, 0, 0 }

memberdef.name: xmlEntityApos
memberdef.initializer: = { NULL, XML_ENTITY_DECL, (xmlChar *) "apos", NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, (xmlChar *) "'", (xmlChar *) "'", 1, XML_INTERNAL_PREDEFINED_ENTITY, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 0, 0, 0 }

briefdescription.para: Frees the entity.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlDocPtr doc, const xmlChar *name, int type, const xmlChar *publicId, const xmlChar *systemId, const xmlChar *content)
memberdef.name: xmlCreateEntity

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlDoc *doc, int extSubset, const xmlChar *name, int type, const xmlChar *publicId, const xmlChar *systemId, const xmlChar *content, xmlEntity **out)
memberdef.name: xmlAddEntity

briefdescription.para: Register a new entity for this document.

parameterdescription.para: add to the external or internal subset

briefdescription.para: Look up a predefined entity.

simplesect.para: the entity, or NULL if not found.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlDoc *doc, const xmlChar *name, int type, const xmlChar *publicId, const xmlChar *systemId, const xmlChar *content)
memberdef.name: xmlAddDtdEntity

briefdescription.para: Add a new entity to the document's external subset.

simplesect.para: a pointer to the entity or NULL in case of error

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlDoc *doc, const xmlChar *name, int type, const xmlChar *publicId, const xmlChar *systemId, const xmlChar *content)
memberdef.name: xmlAddDocEntity

briefdescription.para: Add a new entity to the document's internal subset.

simplesect.para: a pointer to the entity or NULL in case of error

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlDoc *doc, const xmlChar *name, int type, const xmlChar *publicId, const xmlChar *systemId, const xmlChar *content)
memberdef.name: xmlNewEntity

briefdescription.para: Create a new entity.

detaileddescription.para: Like xmlAddDocEntity, but if doc is NULL or has no internal subset defined, an unlinked entity will be returned. It is then the responsibility of the caller to link it to the document later or free it when not needed anymore.

simplesect.para: a pointer to the entity or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Look up an entity in a table.

simplesect.para: a pointer to the entity or NULL if not found.

briefdescription.para: Look up a paramater entity in the internal and external subset of doc.

simplesect.para: a pointer to the entity or NULL if not found.

briefdescription.para: Look up a general entity in the external subset of doc.

simplesect.para: a pointer to the entity or NULL if not found.

briefdescription.para: Look up a general entity in the internal and external subset of doc.

simplesect.para: a pointer to the entity or NULL if not found.

briefdescription.para: Replace special characters with predefined entities or numeric character references.

detaileddescription.para: If doc is NULL or an XML document, replaces <, > and & with predefined entities. Carriage return is replaced with . If doc or its encoding are NULL, non-ASCII characters are replaced with a hexadecimal character reference.
If doc is an HTML document, follows the HTML serialization rules.
Silently removes some invalid characters like ASCII control codes.

parameterdescription.para: A string to convert to XML.

simplesect.para: a newly allocated string with substitutions.

briefdescription.para: Replace special characters with predefined entities or numeric character references.

detaileddescription.para: Replaces <, >, & and " with predefined entities. Carriage return is replaced with .

parameterdescription.para: A string to convert to XML.

simplesect.para: a newly allocated string with substitutions.

briefdescription.para: Create and initialize an empty entities hash table.

simplesect.para: the xmlEntitiesTable just created or NULL in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Deallocate the memory used by an entities in the hash table.
Deallocate the memory used by an entities hash table.
Build a copy of an entity.

simplesect.para: the new xmlEntities or NULL in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Build a copy of an entity table.

simplesect.para: the new xmlEntitiesTable or NULL in case of error.

briefdescription.para: This will dump the content of the entity table as an XML DTD definition.
When using the hash table scan function, arguments need to be reversed.
This will dump the content of the entity table as an XML DTD definition.
